name: trading-infra
description: AI x Crypto Trading Infra — MCP data layer + realistic backtester + eval harness + Qwen reference agent

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --workspace packages/mcp-server install && npm --workspace packages/eval-harness install && npm --workspace packages/qwen-agent install
scripts.build: npm --workspace packages/mcp-server run build && npm --workspace packages/qwen-agent run build && npm --workspace packages/eval-harness run typecheck
scripts.test: npm --workspace packages/mcp-server run test && npm --workspace packages/eval-harness run test && npm --workspace packages/qwen-agent run test
